'''dhatata''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:lcm|lcm]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-t-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lcm|lcm]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhatata
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhætætæth|dhætætæth]] || [[word:dhætætæj|dhætætæj]] || [[word:dhætætæsh|dhætætæsh]] || [[word:dhætætæ|dhætætæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhatatatath|dhatatatath]] || [[word:dhatatataj|dhatatataj]] || [[word:dhatatatash|dhatatatash]] || [[word:dhatatata|dhatatata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhatatath|dhatatath]] || [[word:dhatataj|dhatataj]] || [[word:dhatatash|dhatatash]] || [[word:dhatata|dhatata]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhataftath|dhataftath]] || [[word:dhataftaj|dhataftaj]] || [[word:dhataftash|dhataftash]] || [[word:dhataftaf|dhataftaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhatatatha|dhatatatha]] || [[word:dhatataja|dhatataja]] || [[word:dhatatasha|dhatatasha]] || [[word:dhatataka|dhatataka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhatatath|dhatatath]] || [[word:dhatataj|dhatataj]] || [[word:dhatatash|dhatatash]] || [[word:dhatata|dhatata]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhatatathal|dhatatathal]] || [[word:dhatatajal|dhatatajal]] || [[word:dhatatashal|dhatatashal]] || [[word:dhatatakal|dhatatakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhatatathatha|dhatatathatha]] || [[word:dhatatajaja|dhatatajaja]] || [[word:dhatatashasha|dhatatashasha]] || [[word:dhatataka|dhatataka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhatatathan|dhatatathan]] || [[word:dhatatajan|dhatatajan]] || [[word:dhatatashan|dhatatashan]] || [[word:dhatatakan|dhatatakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhatatathaoro|dhatatathaoro]] || [[word:dhatatajaoro|dhatatajaoro]] || [[word:dhatatashaoro|dhatatashaoro]] || [[word:dhatatakaoro|dhatatakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
